arabicText: أَسْرَارُ حُرُوفِ صَلَاةِ الْفَاتِحِ لَامِعَةٌ فَدَاوِمْ عَلَى تِلَاوَتِهَا لِتَنَالَ الرِّضْوَانَ. [1]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 1 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 1 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 1 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَكُلُّ حَرْفٍ مِنْهَا نُورٌ فِي الْمَلَكُوتِ وَبِهَا تَظْهَرُ الْأَنْوَارُ الرَّبَّانِيَّةُ فِي الْقَلْبِ. [2]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 2 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 2 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 2 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: فَالْفَاءُ فَتْحٌ وَالْأَلِفُ أُلْفَةٌ بَيْنَ الْقُلُوبِ فَهِيَ مِفْتَاحُ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ وَفَلَاحٍ. [3]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 3 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 3 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 3 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: أَسْرَارُ حُرُوفِ صَلَاةِ الْفَاتِحِ لَامِعَةٌ فَدَاوِمْ عَلَى تِلَاوَتِهَا لِتَنَالَ الرِّضْوَانَ. [4]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 4 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 4 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 4 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَكُلُّ حَرْفٍ مِنْهَا نُورٌ فِي الْمَلَكُوتِ وَبِهَا تَظْهَرُ الْأَنْوَارُ الرَّبَّانِيَّةُ فِي الْقَلْبِ. [5]

wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 5 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.

wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 64 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَكُلُّ حَرْفٍ مِنْهَا نُورٌ فِي الْمَلَكُوتِ وَبِهَا تَظْهَرُ الْأَنْوَارُ الرَّبَّانِيَّةُ فِي الْقَلْبِ. [65]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 65 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 65 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 65 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: فَالْفَاءُ فَتْحٌ وَالْأَلِفُ أُلْفَةٌ بَيْنَ الْقُلُوبِ فَهِيَ مِفْتَاحُ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ وَفَلَاحٍ. [66]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 66 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 66 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 66 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: أَسْرَارُ حُرُوفِ صَلَاةِ الْفَاتِحِ لَامِعَةٌ فَدَاوِمْ عَلَى تِلَاوَتِهَا لِتَنَالَ الرِّضْوَانَ. [67]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 67 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 67 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 67 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَكُلُّ حَرْفٍ مِنْهَا نُورٌ فِي الْمَلَكُوتِ وَبِهَا تَظْهَرُ الْأَنْوَارُ الرَّبَّانِيَّةُ فِي الْقَلْبِ. [68]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 68 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 68 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 68 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ
